Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Jay Y. Song, a/k/a Jay Yoon Song.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Lincoln D. Gardner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff A-L Financial Corp.
Rob Lobel, President of A-L Financial Corp., was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Gardner and Lobel appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Jay Y. Song, a/k/a Jay Yoon Song.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on June 5, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons & Complaint on defendant Jay Y. Song, a/k/a Jay Yoon Song, occurred on December 1, 2019 and was effectuated on December 12, 2019.
Default as to defendant Jay Y. Song, a/k/a Jay Yoon Song, was entered on January 17, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 17, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff A-L Financial Corp., and against the defaulted defendant Jay Y. Song, a/k/a Jay Yoon Song, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $28,737.34.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,140.09.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $529.45.

Total - $34,606.88.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
